name: gcc-15-for-host
title: gcc-15-for-host
summary: GNU C compiler for the host architecture
description:
GNU C compiler for the host architecture
This is the GNU C compiler, a fairly portable optimizing compiler for C.
.
When using this package, tools must be invoked with an architecture prefix.
.
This is a dependency package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gcc-15-for-host because GNU C compiler for the host architecture.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use gcc-15-for-host as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gcc-15-for-host with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gcc-15-for-host --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
